## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## What Changed

- summarize the main code, metadata, script, or documentation changes
- include any user-facing or operator-facing behavior changes

## Why

Explain the problem being solved or the improvement being made.

## Validation

- [ ] verified changed files have no workspace errors
- [ ] ran relevant tests, scripts, or manual checks
- [ ] noted any gaps in validation if full verification was not possible

## Risks And Follow-Up

- note any deployment, data, access, or rollback concerns
- list any follow-up actions that should happen after merge
